name: Herring Salad with Apples, Dill Pickles, And
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the herring fillets under cold water.
2. Drain and pat dry with paper towels.
3. Place the fillets in a large bowl.
4. Add diced apples, chopped dill pickles, mayonnaise, olive oil, salt, and pepper.
5. Mix gently until all ingredients are well combined.
6. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
7. Serve immediately or refrigerate until ready to serve.
